All AC-named tests already exist and pass. The implementation in cli/cmd/install.go already
provides:
- --global flag on ddx install (line 49)
- resolveInstallDirs routing global -> ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/, project -> ddxroot.Path() (lines 185-200)
- selectInstallState routing global -> LoadGlobalState/SaveGlobalState, project -> LoadState/SaveState (lines 203-211)
- --global flag on ddx plugin list (line 277)
- --global flag on ddx plugin show (line 315)
- ddxroot.GlobalDir() returning ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global (ddxroot.go line 90)

Tests in cli/cmd/install_global_test.go cover all 5 AC assertions and all pass.

AC6 full suite note: TestWork_WatchKillingWorkerReapsProviderChildWithin5s is a pre-existing
flaky process-timing test unrelated to install routing; it passes when run individually and
fails intermittently under system load. This bead made no changes to that test or code.
